knowledge.insight: KVD: 'I don't cast finesse baits until I know I'm in a good area holding bass. Three triggers to go finesse: (1) really clear water where I can see bass, (2) when bass quit biting power baits to pick up a few more, (3) when a bass blows up on or short-strikes my power bait — I know exactly where it is and cast a finesse worm right there. Go-to finesse: drop shot with Half Shell or finesse worm, then Ocho stick worm, then small jig.'
